questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to Temporary Storage?
options: Inefficient scaling of Session temp tables, global temp tables, CTEs, and materialization optimizations.
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of Session temp tables, global temp tables, CTEs, and materialization optimizations.
questions.explanation: The topic covers how Session temp tables, global temp tables, CTEs, and materialization optimizations scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
